Book Your Stay
Find us

Above the Adriatic, close to everything

Hotel Kleopatra sits on the hillside of Ulcinjs Riviera, offering panoramic sea views while being minutes from the Old Town, Velika Plaza beach and the Bojana river estuary.

Location

Above Ulcinj, at the edge of the sea

Perfectly placed between the historic Old Town and the long golden beaches — everything you came for is within easy reach.

Hotel Kleopatra

Ulcinj Old Town

1.1 km

14 min walk · Historic Landmark

A centuries-old fortress town crowning the coast, with stone lanes, cafés and unforgettable views.

Mala Plaza Beach

0.8 km

10 min walk · City Beach

The beloved main beach of Ulcinj — golden sand and the warm, shallow Adriatic at your doorstep.

Long Beach (Velika Plaža)

6 km

10 min drive · 13 km Beach

One of the longest sandy beaches in Europe, a wild expanse of dunes and endless horizon.

Ada Bojana Island

11 km

18 min drive · River Island

A triangular river island formed by the Bojana River delta, famous for wooden restaurants and nudist beaches.

Ulcinj Marina & Seafront

0.6 km

8 min walk · Dining Quarter

Seafood grills, rooftop cocktails and live music unfold along the lively seafront each evening.

Liberty Monument

0.5 km

7 min walk · Monument

Iconic monument overlooking the sea, dedicated to Ulcinj's independence — a landmark visible from the hotel.

Explore Ulcinj

What to see and do nearby

Ulcinj Old Town
3.5 km · 8 min drive

Walled medieval town with narrow streets, fortress and sea views.

Velika Plaza Beach
3 km · 6 min drive

Montenegro's longest sandy beach — 12 km of golden sand.

Ada Bojana Island
7 km · 12 min drive

River island with pristine beaches, seafood restaurants and kite surfing.

Bojana River
6 km · 10 min drive

Beautiful river delta perfect for boat trips, fishing and bird watching.

Lake Skadar
35 km · 40 min drive

National park with stunning lake scenery, monasteries and wine routes.

Bar & Budva
30–50 km

Coastal towns with Roman ruins, luxury marinas and vibrant nightlife.

Getting here

Your journey to Hotel Kleopatra

Tivat Airport (TIV)75 km · 1 h 15 min
Podgorica Airport (TGD)75 km · 1 h 15 min
Dubrovnik Airport (DBV)80 km · 1 h 30 min
Bar Ferry Port30 km · 30 min
Ulcinj Bus Station2 km · 5 min

Free on-site parking is available for all guests. We can also arrange airport transfers upon request — just let us know your arrival time.

Letters from the coast

Seasonal offers, quiet-season escapes and stories from Ulcinj — a few times a year, never more.

Hotel Kleopatra
Ulcinj · Montenegro

A family-run hotel above the Adriatic, where every guest arrives as a stranger and leaves as a friend.
